text.title: patterns-overview Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for patterns-overview as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Business logic in the database (stored procedures) or in controllers
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Makes the domain untestable without a running database and couples business rules to infrastructure details

failure-mode.description: Dual-write: writing to database and message broker in two separate operations
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If the service crashes between the DB write and the broker publish, the two systems diverge permanently. Use the Outbox pattern instead.
